Interface DataManager

All Known Implementing Classes:
DataLoader
public interface DataManager
DataManager interface defines the contract for loading and saving data related to Applicants, Applications, and Officers. Any class implementing this interface must provide functionality for reading from and writing to a data source (e.g., CSV files).
Version:
1.0
Author:
Hashir

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ArrayList<Applicant>
    loadApplicants()
    Loads applicant data from a data source.
    ArrayList<Application>
    loadApplications()
    Loads application data from a data source.
    ArrayList<Officer>
    loadOfficers()
    Loads officer data from a data source.
    void
    saveApplicants()
    Saves applicant data to a data source.
    void
    saveApplications()
    Saves application data to a data source.
    void
    saveOfficers()
    Saves officer data to a data source.

  • Method Details

    • loadApplicants

      ArrayList<Applicant> loadApplicants()
      Loads applicant data from a data source.
      Returns:
      a list of Applicant objects

      Loads application data from a data source.
      Returns:
      a list of Application objects

    • loadOfficers

      ArrayList<Officer> loadOfficers()
      Loads officer data from a data source.
      Returns:
      a list of Officer objects

    • saveApplicants

      void saveApplicants()
      Saves applicant data to a data source.

    • saveApplications

      void saveApplications()
      Saves application data to a data source.

    • saveOfficers

      void saveOfficers()
      Saves officer data to a data source.
